address.map_location: School of Information Technology, RGPV Bhopal

pos_sentences: The teachers are good in there communicaton skills and they are good to explain the topic effectively so that the student would grasps it.
There are many types of rooms available in the hostel and the mess food is also good and the timing is very well.
There are many clubs active in our college which help adding values to your portfolio
Overall the faculty are good their behaviour is good and they explain very well.
They were trying their best to give each and every student some kind of scholarship.
Knowledge research center which is a very good place to study
neg_sentences: The hostel is not good it has major accommodation problems many students are sleeping on the floor now it's been 2 months since the start of the semester.
It is very difficult to get hostel in first year as their are less room available

The room has only basic facilities fan lights almirah the meal is decent quality registration process is very easy and hostel is very affordable but the hostel toilet are dirty their is very low cleanliness in hostel

It's only allowed 2 students in each room but there are three students in almost every room and 3 are sleeping on the floor there is no wifi, food is decent and toilets are practically always in worse condition.
